title: OpenZoo Card Creator is live
author: gaichu
excerpt: Design and print your own OpenZoo trading cards in the browser.
body_html:
Jack Penman came to me with a simple request: "we need a site like this" — {link:https://mtgcardbuilder.com/|mtgcardbuilder.com}

Say less. {link:https://openzootcg.com/|OpenZooTCG.com} is here! A browser-based tool for designing custom OpenZoo trading cards.

The Card Editor has templates to quickly create the various OpenZoo card types.

  • Beastie
  • Artifact
  • Spell
  • Potion
  • Aura
  • Terra
  • Token

And built-in support for card variants.

  • Borderless
  • Sample or Playtester
  • Japanese

Effect blocks use auto layout, so the card formats itself as you build it. Optional 3.5mm bleed for print-ready output. Also works great for vintage MetaZoo proxies.

Join the {link:https://discord.gg/2jQPtQceqT|OpenZoo discord} to see newly created cards automatically posted to #gallery by the Gallery bot. You can even remix other people's cards. Give it a try!

Source is available on {link:https://github.com/Gaichuuu/openzoo-card-creator|GitHub}. The codebase is MIT licensed and assets are CC BY-SA 3.0.

title: OpenZoo Tabletop Simulator mod
author: gaichu
excerpt: Play with over 1,000 cards from OpenZoo and MetaZoo.
body_html:
You can now play OpenZoo (and vintage MetaZoo) on {link:https://store.steampowered.com/app/286160/Tabletop_Simulator/|Tabletop Simulator}. Subscribe to the mod on the {link:https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3653472444|Steam Workshop} and you're all set.

The mod is based on the original MetaZoo PlayTesting and Deckbuilding Table, created by Aussie Brickster. He gave us his blessing to take what was created and build on top of it.

Here's what's included in the initial release:

OpenZoo

  • Legacy (36 cards)
  • Promo 2025 (3 cards)

MetaZoo

  • Cryptid Nation 2nd Edition (189 cards)
  • Nightfall (193 cards)
  • Wilderness (200 cards)
  • UFO (193 cards)
  • Seance (230 cards)

That's over 1,000 cards to play with. There's also a Card Sleever panel for changing card back on any deck.

The majority of card scans are from {link:https://metazaurus.com/|MetaZaurus}. Thanks again to MetaZaurus, and anyone else that put long hours into creating these high-quality card scans. We'll continue to update the mod and add additional decks, such as Native and KCC. The eventual goal is to have decks created with MetaZoo Cryptid's {link:https://www.metazoocryptids.com/gameplay|deckbuilder} export into the OpenZoo TTS mod.

This mod generator is open source and available as part of the {link:https://github.com/Gaichuuu/gaichu-tcg-database/tree/main/tts-mod|Gaichu repo}.

title: MetaZaurus PDA-reader application
author: grimzwald
body_html:
(Posted originally from the {link:http://discord.gg/WjqHNqMM4m|Artist Appreciation Project} discord)

I want to take a moment to share something with you all which ties back to the roots of my journey in the community and the evolution of the AAP.

MetaZaurus

(now there's a name you haven't heard in a while...)

For those of you who are new here, MetaZaurus was my alias back when I was running the card database site under the same name. It was a labour of love and something that I never profited from, even before MetaZoo went bankrupt and I had offers (from Mike himself) to purchase or take over the site. I declined because it didn't align with my vision and I ultimately took the site down and moved on, choosing to focus on the AAP and the incredible group of talent we have today.

Recently, {link:https://github.com/CamelJR|CamelJR} (a long-time supporter of the AAP and the Kickstarter) approached me with a proposal to revive MetaZaurus as a historical resource. I was skeptical at first, but the results have far exceeded my expectations. The new site faithfully recreates the original PDA-style interface (something I always dreamed of but couldn't achieve) and improves on it in different ways. What's even better is that the data is now open source ({link:https://github.com/Gaichuuu/metazaurus|available on GitHub}), ensuring it remains a community resource for years to come.

Although I'm no longer involved in this type of work beyond passing along my archives and giving my blessing, I wanted to highlight the incredible effort CamelJR has put into reviving this project. For the OGs amongst us, I hope you'll appreciate the care that's gone into it, and for newer members I hope this serves as a reminder of how far we've come as a community and why initiatives like the AAP matter so much.

Kudos again to CamelJR for making this happen 🙌

{link:https://metazaurus.com/|metazaurus.com}

{img:07-1.png}

title: WrennyMoo is BACK as katu.ramen
author: gaichu
excerpt: Alex Roh returns with new card game Tygadu.
body_html:
(Update 02/03: URL has been changed to {link:https://katuramen.myshopify.com|katuramen.myshopify.com})

A new Shopify store katu.ramen is selling "Tygadu" packs... is this the return of {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/wm|WrennyMoo}?

The evidence

The katu.ramen store runs on "e90886-3.myshopify.com" ~ the same URL that hosted the original WrennyMoo shop ({link:https://web.archive.org/web/20231029040507/https://e90886-3.myshopify.com/|confirmed via Wayback Machine}). WrennyMoo promotional images are still accessible on the store CDN ({link:https://e90886-3.myshopify.com/cdn/shop/files/Untitled_Artwork_1.png|example 1}, {link:https://e90886-3.myshopify.com/cdn/shop/files/IMG-8343.jpg|example 2}).

Purchasing Tygadu packs reveals the merchant alex roh with email Moomooarmin@gmail.com. So there you have it, the creator of WrennyMoo has officially returned!

The product

"Trading cards are so much fun that people travel by boat to buy them. Give this card to a friend and they'll cheer for three days. It's the best gift you can give."
{img:06-1.png}

Packs are {link:https://e90886-3.myshopify.com/|available on Shopify}:

  • 1x Tygadu Pack — $12 (7 cards: 6 commons + 1 holo rare)
  • 5x Tygadu Pack Set — $45 ($9/pack)
  • 10x Tygadu Pack Set — $80 ($8/pack)

The set has 30 characters (60 cards total: 30 commons + 30 holo variants). Same derpy formula as WrennyMoo, but anime instead of Pokémon.

  • Chainsaw Man — Power, Denji, Makima, Ika
  • Naruto — Itachi, Kakashi, Shikamaru
  • Jujutsu Kaisen — Gojo, Yuji
  • Demon Slayer — Mitsuri, Kanao
  • Neon Genesis Evangelion — Rei, Asuka
  • One Piece — Luffy, Zoro
  • And more...

Welcome back, Alex. <3

title: eBay price tracking
author: gaichu
excerpt: Sold price tracking for WrennyMoo and After Skool Hobby cards.
body_html:
You can now see eBay sold price tracking for {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/wm|WrennyMoo} and {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/ash|After Skool Hobby} cards.

Set pages ~ Browse wm or ash and you'll see average sold prices on each card.

Sales panel ~ Card detail pages now show a sales panel with:

  • Number of recent sales
  • Lowest/highest sold price
  • 90-day rolling average

The panel includes a link to eBay sold listings for that card.

Weekly price sync ~ A scheduled job runs every Monday at 8 AM UTC and fetches completed eBay sales using the {link:https://github.com/colindaniels/eBay-sold-items-documentation|eBay Sold Items API}.

Search queries ~ Each card is searched using:

{indent}Keywords: Series name + card name, with spelling variants like:{/indent}{code}("wrenny moo",wrennymoo) Pidgey{/code}{indent}Excluded keywords: lot, bundle, complete, etc.{/indent}

90-day rolling average ~ Each sync merges new sales with existing data, deduplicates by eBay listing ID, and filters out sales older than 90 days. Price stats are recalculated from this rolling window.

title: Gaichu database API
author: gaichu
excerpt: Public REST API for accessing the Gaichu card database.
body_html:
As requested by {link:https://www.metazoocryptids.com/|MetaZoo Cryptids}, the Gaichu API is now publicly available!

  • Search cards by name, type, rarity, or illustrator
  • Browse all series: After Skool Hobby, Disgruntled Games, MetaZoo, OpenZoo, WrennyMoo
  • Get card images, stats, and effects
  • Multi-language support: English and Japanese text (WrennyMoo)
  • Average sold prices from eBay (WrennyMoo and After Skool Hobby)

Quick start

Fetch all OpenZoo Legacy cards:

{code}curl "https://us-central1-gaichu-fe55f.cloudfunctions.net/api/v1/cards?series=oz&set=legacy"{/code}

Search for any card by name:

{code}curl "https://us-central1-gaichu-fe55f.cloudfunctions.net/api/v1/cards/search?q=mothman"{/code}

Available endpoints

Cards

  • GET /v1/cards - List cards with filtering and pagination
  • GET /v1/cards/:id - Get a single card
  • GET /v1/cards/search?q= - Search by name or effect

Series & Sets

  • GET /v1/series - List all series
  • GET /v1/series/:shortName/cards - Get all cards in a series
  • GET /v1/sets/:id/cards - Get all cards in a set

Other

  • GET /v1/illustrators - List all illustrators
  • GET /v1/rarity - List rarity types
  • GET /v1/stats - Database statistics

The /v1/cards endpoint supports these filters:

  • series - ash, disgruntled, mz, oz, wm
  • set, rarity, type, illustrator
  • page & limit - Max 100 per page

Full documentation is available on {link:https://github.com/Gaichuuu/gaichu-tcg-database/blob/main/gaichu-api/README.md|GitHub}.

title: Gaichu news service is live
author: gaichu
excerpt: We've created a safe space right here for your (probably) trusted news.
body_html:
We've heard you. You're tired of digging through discord dungeons for salacious scraps of gossip. Fun sometimes, like watching Canadian casters pass gas in the dead of night. Butt not the best way to get facts. So we've created a safe space right here for your (probably) trusted Gaichu news.

Look forward to updates on various bootleg tcgs in our database. And plenty of investigative reporting. For this, we use the scam-o-meter:

Sus 🚩🚩
Typical grifter grifting.

Sus 🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩
Several rule or law violations.

Sus 🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩
Millions of dollars missing.

That's all folks. See you in the salt mines.

title: How to get your OpenZoo Xmas promo
author: gaichu
excerpt: We're running a fun holiday OpenZoo promotion all December.
body_html:
We're running a fun holiday OpenZoo promotion all December. Here's how to get your free Christmas Waheela promo card.

{img:02-4.png|OpenZoo Xmas Promo}1. Send a holiday card to the Gaichu PO box anytime in December 2025. If it arrives a little late, that's fine.

2. Include your name and mailing address. I'll use this to send your promo card.

3. You're done.

Mail your holiday cards to:

{indent}Gaichu
26400 NE Valley St #643
Duvall, WA{/indent}{img:02-5.jpg|Gaichu Holiday Promo Printing}

All promo cards are printed and cut at Gaichu HQ (Gaiyaya). Expect a few rare variants to sneak in... including playtester and sample cards. Have you been a good boy this year?

See {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/oz/sets/promo25/card/3_christmas-waheela|Christmas Waheela} on the OpenZoo database.

{youtube:jrRxafAnx0c}{youtube:0lfVWBPNew8}

title: OpenZoo Legacy is here
author: gaichu
excerpt: Print at home or order the full playset from Game Crafter.
body_html:
Casters, the wait is over. Legacy is available now, and you have several options to play.

Print for free: Visit the {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/oz/sets/legacy|Legacy set page} and click the "Print" button to open the PDF. You can print the entire set at home.

Print on demand: Order a Legacy deck from {link:https://www.thegamecrafter.com/games/openzoo-legacy|Game Crafter} for $15.99. The deck includes the full 85-card playset. Production times can vary, so expect it to take a few weeks.

{img:03-1.jpg}{youtube:wbM2S0FvOKg}
